export interface StreamListener<T> { next(value: T): void; throw(value: unknown): void; return(value: T): void; } export interface Stream<T> { __SEROVAL_STREAM__: true; on(listener: StreamListener<T>): () => void; next(value: T): void; throw(value: unknown): void; return(value: T): void; } export declare function isStream<T>(value: object): value is Stream<T>; export declare function createStream<T>(): Stream<T>; export declare function createStreamFromAsyncIterable<T>(iterable: AsyncIterable<T>): Stream<T>; export declare function streamToAsyncIterable<T>(stream: Stream<T>): () => AsyncIterableIterator<T>; //# sourceMappingURL=stream.d.ts.map
